title: Deliver a bounded widget
objective: Implement and verify the accepted widget behavior.

tasks.title: Implement and verify the widget
tasks.objective: Deliver two independently verifiable widget outcomes.

outcomes.title: Implement the widget behavior
outcomes.objective: Implement the accepted bounded widget behavior.
acceptance_criteria: The accepted widget behavior is implemented without adjacent work.

outcomes.title: Verify the widget behavior
outcomes.objective: Verify the accepted widget behavior from direct evidence.
acceptance_criteria: The widget behavior passes its declared validation.
